Sports.summary: Coleraine manager Ruaidhrí Higgins says his side "contributed" to their own downfall in Thursday's 5-0 away defeat by HJK in the first leg of their Uefa Conference League second qualifying round tie.

Sports.title: Hull KR inflict more derby misery on Hull FC
Sports.summary: Out-of-form Super League champions Hull KR put a stop to their losing run as they battle back to beat city rivals Hull FC in a feisty derby.

Sports.title: Defoe leaves Woking after 'eye-opening' first managerial role
Sports.summary: Former England and Tottenham striker Jermain Defoe has described his first managerial job as an "eye-opening experience" following his departure from National League side Woking after just four months and nine matches in charge.

Sports.title: Super Giants beat Spirit despite Livingstone flurry
Sports.summary: Manchester Super Giants beat London Spirit by seven runs in The Hundred at Lord's, as Liam Livingstone's big-hitting effort falls just short.

Sports.title: A night of brilliant batting but Livingstone's efforts fall just short
Sports.summary: Liam Livingstone hits 69 off 40 balls as he almost leads London Spirit to a successful chase of 139 against Manchester Super Giants, but is bowled with just three balls remaining as his side fall short in their opening game of The Hundred.

Sports.title: 'What's happened there?!' - Buttler and Dawson's moment to forget
Sports.summary: Manchester Super Giants fielders Jos Buttler and Liam Dawson inadvertently teach a vital lesson in communication after a huge fielding mix-up, missing a simple catch that would have removed London Spirit's Kiran Carlson in the men's Hundred.

Sports.title: Ready to 'conquer Earth' - Joshua embraces comeback spotlight
Sports.summary: Anthony Joshua appears relaxed and encourages a sizeable Albanian contingent, supporting his opponent, to bring their "energy" for his comeback fight on Saturday.

Sports.title: 'A brutal innings' - Seifert's best strikes of his half-century
Sports.summary: Manchester Super Giants' Tim Seifert hits 67 off 45 balls - an innings that included nine boundaries - to help set London Spirit 139 to win in their opening fixture of the 2026 men's Hundred.
